title: webauthn auth_complete updates all credentials regardless of match
description: webauthn.rs auth_complete() (lines 412-427): after successful authentication, it calls load_passkeys() to get all credentials, then iterates them all calling pk.update_credential(&auth_result). However update_credential only modifies the credential that matched (by cred_id). Then it iterates ALL passkeys calling update_credential_bycred_id() for EACH one — which itself loads ALL rows from DB and scans for a match. For N passkeys this is O(N^2) DB queries. Since this is single-admin with typically 1-3 passkeys, it is not a performance problem, but the intent is unclear — only the matched credential needs updating.
close_reason: Deferred: credential count is typically 1-3. O(N) queries where N<=3.
